---
title: "proteoDA_v2.0_preprocessing"
author: "Byrum Lab"
date: "2025-11-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# A) Table of filtering options

```{r filtering_table}
opts <- data.frame(
Function = c("zero_to_missing", "filter_proteins_by_group", "filter_proteins_per_contrast"),

Purpose  = c(
"Convert embedded zeros to NA for missing-aware downstream steps",
"Global filtering across all groups: require presence within groups",
"Contrast-specific filtering: enforce per-comparison presence criteria"
),

Key_Args = c(
"-",
"min_reps, min_groups, grouping_column",
"min_reps, require_both_groups, grouping_column, contrasts_file"
),

When_to_use = c(
"Almost always, before filtering and modeling",
"Quick global cleanup when all groups should share rules",
"Best for heterogeneous designs; preserves proteins relevant to each contrast"
),
Output = c(
"DAList with NAs representing missingness",
"DAList (globally filtered)",
"DAList bundle (per-contrast filtering + bookkeeping)"
),
stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(opts, caption = "Filtering options in proteoDA v2.0")
```
